mapper.select: SELECT doc_id, doc_title, form_code, drafter_no, drafter_name, drafter_dept, status, content, created_at, updated_at FROM platform_v3.ap_document WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
SELECT line_id, doc_id, step_order, approver_no, approver_name, role, status, comment, acted_at FROM platform_v3.ap_approval_line WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY step_order
SELECT code AS form_code, code_name AS form_name, sort_order FROM platform_v3.cm_code WHERE group_cd = 'FORM_CODE' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_document (doc_title, form_code, drafter_no, drafter_name, drafter_dept, status, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{docTitle}, #{formCode}, #{drafterNo}, #{drafterName}, #{drafterDept}, #{status}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_approval_line (doc_id, step_order, approver_no, approver_name, role, status) VALUES (#{docId}, #{stepOrder}, #{approverNo}, #{approverName}, #{role}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'PENDING'))
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.ap_approval_line SET status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, acted_at = NOW() WHERE line_id = #{lineId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.doc_id) FROM platform_v3.ap_document d INNER JOIN platform_v3.ap_approval_line l ON l.doc_id = d.doc_id WHERE d.status = 'PENDING' AND l.approver_no = #{userNo} AND l.status = 'PENDING'

SELECT e.employee_no AS approver_no, e.employee_name AS approver_name, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.position_level <=
2 1 2 3
ORDER BY p.position_level LIMIT 2 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_attachment (doc_id, object_key, filename, size_bytes, mime_type, uploader_no) VALUES (#{docId}, #{objectKey}, #{filename}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{uploaderNo})
mapper.select: SELECT attach_id, doc_id, object_key, filename, size_bytes, mime_type, uploader_no, uploaded_at FROM platform_v3.ap_attachment WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY uploaded_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_history (doc_id, line_id, action, actor_no, actor_name, comment) VALUES (#{docId}, #{lineId}, #{action}, #{actorNo}, #{actorName}, #{comment})
mapper.select: SELECT history_id, doc_id, line_id, action, actor_no, actor_name, comment, acted_at FROM platform_v3.ap_history WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY acted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_delegation (delegator_no, delegatee_no, reason, from_date, to_date, active) VALUES (#{delegatorNo}, #{delegateeNo}, #{reason}, CAST(#{fromDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE), TRUE)
mapper.select: SELECT delegation_id, delegator_no, delegatee_no, reason, from_date, to_date FROM platform_v3.ap_delegation WHERE delegator_no = #{delegatorNo} AND active = TRUE AND from_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND to_date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY from_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ap_document (doc_title, form_code, drafter_no, drafter_name, drafter_dept, status, content, amount, parent_doc_id, version, created_at, updated_at) SELECT d.doc_title, d.form_code, d.drafter_no, d.drafter_name, d.drafter_dept, 'PENDING', COALESCE(#{content}, d.content), COALESCE(#{amount}, d.amount), d.doc_id, d.version + 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM platform_v3.ap_document d WHERE d.doc_id = #{sourceDocId}
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.ap_document SET doc_title = COALESCE(#{docTitle}, doc_title), content = COALESCE(#{content}, content), amount = COALESCE(#{amount}, amount), updated_at = NOW() WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
